title: hedysarum boreale var. rivulare
intro: Hedysarum boreale var. rivulare, also known as the alpine sweet pea or rivular Hedysarum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hedysarum boreale var. rivulare include its ability to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other related conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its potential health benefits.
